action.reasoning: Observation: Diagnostic in iter 2 segfaulted (exit 139) on import of ogb.graphproppred.mol_encoder.AtomEncoder (and torch_geometric), despite data files present; previous pipeline used GCN without edge_attr. Analysis: Likely extension/version mismatch in preinstalled PyG/ogb causing C++ crash on import; implementing AtomEncoder/BondEncoder locally avoids ogb entirely. Adding edge_attr to Datasets/Data objects and switching to GINEConv (standard for mol graphs) will use all provided features for stronger baseline while keeping param count low. Set num_workers=0 to avoid multiprocessing segfaults; remove excessive stdout prints, keep metrics.jsonl logging. Decision: Rewrite model/train/predict with local encoders + GINEConv, train 3 epochs, submit_eval immediately for baseline avg_precision and to measure iteration time before longer runs.
